sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FWD Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:FWD
feed.summary: The AB Disruptors ETF (FWD) is an actively managed fund that seeks capital growth by investing in companies globally that are at the forefront of innovative growth trends and are considered market disrupters. The fund, issued by Equitable Holdings, Inc., has assets under management of $1.64 billion and an expense ratio of 0.65%. It focuses on stocks, with potential heavy weighting in the Information Technology sector, and pays dividends with a yield of 0.10%.

feed.title: SMCI Investor Alert: Super Micro Computer Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities class action lawsuit against Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI). The lawsuit names CEO Charles Liang and CFO David Weigand as individual defendants, alleging they enabled an illegal scheme to export AI servers to China, leading to a 33.3% stock decline after the DOJ unsealed an indictment. Investors who suffered losses during the Class Period (April 30, 2024, through March 19, 2026) are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially lead the class action by May 25, 2026.

feed.title: A Look At RTX (RTX) Valuation As Long Term Returns Contrast With Richer P/E Multiple
feed.summary: RTX (RTX) has seen mixed share performance recently, with strong long-term returns but a weaker short-term trend. Despite being considered 9.7% undervalued by analysts with a fair value of $217.21 per share, its current P/E of 39.2x is richer than the industry average, suggesting its future growth might already be priced in. The company boasts a robust backlog of $236 billion, indicating strong future revenue growth potential in defense and commercial aerospace, but faces risks like jet engine reliability issues and potential budget shifts.

feed.title: A Look At PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Recent Analyst Downgrades
feed.summary: Recent analyst downgrades by firms like Citigroup and UBS have shifted focus to PPG Industries' valuation. Despite recent declines in short-term share price performance, PPG's stock is considered 32.4% undervalued by Simply Wall St's narrative, with a fair value of $152.76 against a current price of $103.24. This assessment is based on the company's earnings, revenue trajectories, and profit margins, noting potential risks from divestitures or weakened demand in key sectors.

feed.title: INVESCO Ltd. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of INVESCO Ltd. (IVZ) declined by 5.22% on Monday, closing at $22.88, despite an overall positive trading day for the broader market. Both the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw gains. This marks the second consecutive day of losses for INVESCO's stock.

feed.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. stock falls Monday, underperforms market
feed.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN) stock fell 0.23% to C$8.63 on Monday, underperforming the S&P/TSX Composite Index which rose 0.22%. The company's shares closed 10.9% below their 52-week high of C$9.69, achieved on February 27th. This movement occurred during an otherwise positive trading session for the Canadian market.

feed.title: Pinnacle West to discuss Q1 results at May 4 webcast, noon ET
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. (NYSE: PNW) has announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, before the U.S. financial markets open. The company's management will host a live webcast and conference call at noon ET on the same day to discuss the results and recent developments. The webcast will be accessible via pinnaclewest.com/presentations, and an audio replay will also be available for a limited time.

feed.title: Ascendis Pharma’s YUVIWEL gains orphan drug exclusivity in U.S.
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma's YUVIWEL has received orphan drug exclusivity from the U.S. FDA and is now commercially available for children with achondroplasia. The drug, approved on February 27, 2026, benefits from marketing exclusivity until February 27, 2033, along with other incentives for rare disease treatments. Ascendis Pharma is experiencing strong financial growth, with a significant revenue increase and stock surge, and analysts anticipate continued sales growth and profitability.

feed.title: Jones Cecilia, Agios Pharmaceuticals CFO, sells $109k in stock
feed.summary: Agios Pharmaceuticals CFO, Cecilia Jones, sold 3,141 shares of common stock worth $109,024 to cover tax obligations related to vested performance share units. The sale was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Jones exercised options for 8,500 shares and still directly owns 54,998 shares, as the company stock has gained nearly 19% recently and is considered undervalued.

feed.title: Brian Foley joins American Integrity (NYSE: AII) as new CFO
feed.summary: American Integrity Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: AII) has appointed Brian Foley as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 6, 2026. Foley, who previously worked at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, will receive an annual base salary of $600,000, eligibility for an annual cash bonus of up to $400,000, and long-term equity awards. Former CFO Ben Lurie will transition to a consulting role, earning an annual fee of $300,000 and potentially an $800,000 IPO success bonus, while retaining some board and committee roles.

feed.title: [144] Ulta Beauty, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing is a Form 144 for Ulta Beauty, Inc. (ULTA), indicating a proposed sale of securities. The document details the type of securities (Common Stock), the number of shares to be sold (452), their aggregate market value, and the acquisition date and nature of the acquisition (stock award for compensation). This type of filing is used for notice of proposed sales of restricted and control securities.

feed.title: Arhaus (ARHS) officer nets new stock after RSU and dividend rights vest
feed.summary: Kathy E. Veltri, Chief Retail Officer of Arhaus, converted 11,804 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and 610 Dividend Equivalent Rights into 12,414 shares of Class A Common Stock. To cover tax obligations, 4,901 shares were withheld, leaving her with 497,760 Class A shares directly held. These RSUs and Dividend Equivalent Rights vest in three equal annual installments, contingent upon her continuous service to the company.

feed.title: MAA (NYSE: MAA) CFO sells shares to cover restricted stock taxes
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (NYSE: MAA) EVP and CFO Aubrey Clay recently reported equity compensation activity and a modest stock sale. On April 1, 2026, Clay received 3,643 shares of common stock, with 237 shares withheld for tax obligations on vested restricted stock. Additionally, on April 6, 2026, he sold 145 shares at $124.73 each under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan to cover further tax liabilities from previous restricted stock vestings, leaving him with 13,679 shares directly held.

feed.title: Anteris Technologies Global (NASDAQ:AVR) Trading Down 5.8% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Anteris Technologies Global (NASDAQ:AVR) experienced a 5.8% drop in its stock price, trading at $5.18 on light volume. Despite weak profitability with a reported ($0.75) EPS and $0.31M revenue, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $15.33. Notably, major shareholder L1 Capital increased its stake significantly in January, indicating insider confidence.

feed.title: Assurant (AIZ) 2026 proxy details pay, equity plan boost and governance votes
feed.summary: Assurant is preparing for its 2026 annual meeting on May 21, where stockholders will vote on electing directors, ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, approving 2025 executive pay, amending its 2017 long-term equity incentive plan, and considering a stockholder proposal for written consent. The company reported strong 2025 financial performance, including $12.4 billion in net earned premiums and $872.7 million in net income, and highlighted its commitment to strong corporate governance and linking executive compensation to financial performance. A key proposal involves increasing the available share reserve for its equity incentive plan by 480,000 common shares to continue attracting and retaining key talent.

feed.title: Tapestry, Inc. Appoints Matt Madrigal to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) has appointed Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS), to its Board of Directors. Madrigal's expertise in technology, e-commerce, and consumer behavior, particularly concerning younger generations, is expected to be instrumental in advancing Tapestry's growth agenda and building emotional connections with consumers. His experience scaling global consumer platforms and driving innovation is seen as a valuable asset for the company's long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: Dad, son burned to death in Tesla days before Christmas because they couldn’t get out, lawsuit says
feed.summary: A mother has filed a wrongful death lawsuit against Tesla after her 14-year-old son and his father burned to death in a Tesla Model 3 crash in December 2024. The lawsuit alleges that features of the car, including electric-powered door handles becoming inoperable and system failures due to the lithium-ion battery fire, trapped them inside. It also claims Tesla’s "autopilot" features, such as Lane Departure Avoidance and Automatic Emergency Braking, did not function as marketed, leading to the crash.

feed.title: Public Storage (PSA) sells $500M 5.000% unsecured notes maturing 2035
feed.summary: Public Storage Operating Company, a subsidiary of Public Storage (PSA), has successfully completed an offering of $500 million in 5.000% Senior Notes due December 15, 2035. These unsecured, unsubordinated obligations are guaranteed by Public Storage and will pay semi-annual interest. The notes include covenants that restrict additional secured and unsecured borrowing and significant corporate events, ensuring PSOC maintains total unencumbered assets of at least 125% of its total unsecured indebtedness.

feed.title: AvalonBay (NYSE: AVB) outlines 2026 proxy, new 4M-share equity plan and board votes
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE: AVB) is seeking stockholder approval for its 2026 proxy statement, which includes a new 4-million-share equity incentive plan. The plan aims to align employee and director compensation with long-term value creation and performance, replacing an expiring 2009 plan. Stockholders will also vote on the election of 12 directors, advisory executive compensation, and the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as independent auditor during the virtual annual meeting on May 20, 2026.

feed.title: Kotouc group (NYSE: ASB) reports 5.65% stake and merger lock-up terms
feed.summary: The Kotouc family entities have disclosed a 5.65% stake in Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB), holding 10,648,000 shares after its merger with American National Corporation. This stake resulted from stock consideration in the merger, with an exchange ratio of 36.250 Associated shares for each American National share. The holding is subject to a Transfer, Voting and Registration Rights Agreement that includes lock-up restrictions and voting commitments aligned with Associated's board recommendations.

feed.title: MarketAxess (NASDAQ: MKTX) CEO surrenders 349 shares for tax withholding
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. CEO Christopher R. Concannon surrendered 349 shares of common stock at $171.46 per share to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units. This administrative transaction, detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing, is not an open-market sale, and Concannon still holds 53,600 shares directly after the disposition. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment on the company's stock.

feed.title: Lozier & ANC Trust disclose 11.83M shares in Associated Banc (ASB)
feed.summary: Dianne S. Lozier and the ANC Stock Holding Trust have jointly reported beneficial ownership of 11,830,042 shares of Associated Banc-Corp (ASB), representing 6.28% of the outstanding common stock as of April 1, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating shared voting and dispositive power over these shares. The filing notes that Ms. Lozier serves as the trustee for the ANC Stock Holding Trust.

feed.title: Array Digital (AD) CEO nets more shares after RSU and PSU vesting
feed.summary: Array Digital (AD) CEO Anthony J. Carlson exercised equity awards, converting 1,742 restricted stock units and 4,150 performance share units into a total of 5,892 common shares. The shares were valued at $48.00 each, based on the prior trading day's closing price. Following tax withholding for 1,728 shares, Carlson now directly holds 13,093 common shares, with no open-market purchases or sales reported.

feed.title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 earnings after the market close on April 27, 2026. The company will host a conference call on April 28, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET to discuss the results, with replay options available until May 28, 2026. Supplemental earnings attachments and a teleconference presentation will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Insider sale notice — AMD (NASDAQ: AMD) reports 3,293 restricted shares
feed.summary: AMD has filed a Form 144 notice disclosing a proposed sale of 3,293 restricted common shares through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC. The filing, dated April 6, 2026, also reports a past sale by Mark Papermaster of 3,034 shares on March 4, 2026, for $606,800. This document provides transparency regarding upcoming and recent insider stock transactions for Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

feed.title: Pinterest CTO Matt Madrigal joins Tapestry (NYSE: TPR) board as 11th director
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc. has expanded its Board of Directors to eleven members by appointing Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. Madrigal's appointment is effective April 6, 2026, and he will serve as an independent director, receiving an annual cash retainer and equity grants in restricted stock units. His expertise in technology, e-commerce, and consumer behavior, particularly with younger demographics, is expected to support Tapestry's Amplify growth strategy.

feed.title: Tapestry, Inc. Appoints Matt Madrigal to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) has appointed Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS), to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Madrigal's expertise in technology, e-commerce, and consumer behavior, particularly with younger demographics, is expected to support Tapestry's growth agenda. His appointment expands the board to eleven members, with ten being independent directors.

feed.title: Albemarle sets May 7 investor call after reporting Q1 results
feed.summary: Albemarle (NYSE: ALB) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after the NYSE close on May 6, 2026. The company will then host a conference call to discuss these results on May 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EDT. Access to the call will be available via webcast or direct dial, with a replay posted on their investor relations website.

feed.title: Armen of Agenus (NASDAQ: AGEN) takes salary in stock
feed.summary: Agenus director Garo H. Armen reported receiving 4,629 shares of common stock as fully vested compensation in lieu of cash salary for the pay period ending April 3, 2026. The shares were valued at $3.33 each, based on the closing price on April 2, 2026. Following this transaction, Mr. Armen directly holds 339,147 shares of Agenus common stock and also has indirect holdings through IRA accounts, a GRAT, and a partnership.

feed.title: Biogen : to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results April 29, 2026
feed.summary: Biogen Inc. announced that it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before the financial markets open. Following the release, the company will host a live webcast with management at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. The webcast will be accessible through the investors section of Biogen's website, and an archived version will be available for 90 days.

feed.title: 5,091-share sale notice by DRI (NYSE: DRI) after option exercise under plan
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants Inc (NYSE: DRI) has filed a Form 144 notice to sell 5,091 shares, which resulted from an option exercise under a registered plan dated April 6, 2026. The sale method is listed as cash, and prior sales of 1,200 shares on January 6, 2026, yielded $236,964.00. Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC is handling the proposed transaction.

feed.title: [Form 4] AGIOS PHARMACEUTICALS, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: AGIOS PHARMACEUTICALS, INC. Chief Medical Officer Sarah Gheuens exercised 8,500 performance share units after a regulatory milestone was met on April 2, 2026. Following this, she sold 2,940 shares of common stock at $34.71 per share to cover tax withholding obligations, as per pre-set instructions. After these transactions, Gheuens directly owns 80,277 common shares, including shares from the company's employee stock purchase plan.

feed.title: YXT Forecast — Price Prediction for 2026. Should I Buy YXT?
feed.summary: This article provides a stock price prediction for YXT.Com Group Holding Ltd (YXT) for 2026 and beyond, based on technical signals, moving average trends, short sell data, chart pattern matching, and seasonality analysis. Despite overall negative signals leading to a "Strong Sell" recommendation, the analysis also presents monthly price forecasts for 2026 with potential returns and identifies May as historically the best month for positive returns. The article details both bullish and bearish technical indicators and provides a 2030 forecast.

feed.title: EPAM (NYSE: EPAM) seeks special meeting right, equity plan share increases
feed.summary: EPAM Systems is requesting shareholder approval at its 2026 annual meeting for several key proposals, including the election of four Class II directors, an advisory vote on executive compensation, and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as its auditor for 2026. The company also seeks to amend its certificate of incorporation to allow shareholders to call special meetings with a 25% ownership threshold, while opposing a competing shareholder proposal for a 10% threshold. Additionally, EPAM is asking for an increase of 4,000,000 shares for its 2025 Long Term Incentive Plan and 650,000 shares for its 2021 Employee Stock Purchase Plan to continue its growth strategy, particularly in AI, and align employee interests with shareholders.

feed.title: Iconic restaurant chain closes its last locations after 30 years
feed.summary: Bahama Breeze, an iconic restaurant chain known for its Caribbean-inspired theme, has closed all its remaining 28 locations after 30 years, with the last day of operation being April 5th. Darden Restaurants Inc., the parent company, stated that the brand was no longer a "strategic priority." While 14 locations are permanently closed, the other 14 will be converted into different Darden-owned restaurant brands.

feed.title: Key facts: UNH Slides on 0.09% Medicare Hike; RJ $330 Target; $447.6B
feed.summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) experienced a slight decline in stock value following a proposed 0.09% Medicare rate hike, which could impact Medicare Advantage margins. Despite this, Raymond James upgraded UNH to Outperform with a $330 target, anticipating G&A savings and improved visibility into Optum Health margins. The company, operating through health insurance and Optum units, reported $447.6 billion in trailing-12-month revenue, leveraging its scale for negotiations.

feed.title: Corning Inc stock: AI boom drives 50% YTD rally – buy now?
feed.summary: Corning Inc. has seen a significant 50.2% year-to-date rally in 2026, driven by strong demand from AI data centers and major deals with Meta and Apple. The materials company, known for Gorilla Glass and optical fiber, is considered a "pick-and-shovel" play in the AI, 5G, and EV megatrends, offering diversified tech exposure. While recent trading has shown some volatility, analysts remain largely bullish on Corning's earnings potential and long-term growth driven by AI infrastructure buildout.

feed.title: agilon health Sets Date to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: agilon health (NYSE: AGL) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the conference call via a dial-in number or a simultaneous webcast on agilon health’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Robust 2025 growth, new leadership in Insulet (NASDAQ: PODD) 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Insulet's 2026 proxy statement highlights strong financial performance in 2025, with revenue reaching approximately $2.7 billion and robust growth in its Omnipod business. The company emphasizes its shareholder-aligned executive compensation and governance practices, alongside sustainability initiatives. Shareholders are asked to vote on the election of three Class I directors, executive compensation, and the ratification of the independent auditor at the upcoming virtual annual meeting.

feed.title: Agios (NASDAQ: AGIO) exec sells shares to cover PSU tax obligations
feed.summary: Agios Pharmaceuticals executive Krishnan Viswanadhan sold 2,959 shares of the company's common stock at $34.71 per share to cover tax withholding obligations after 8,100 performance share units (PSUs) vested. The vesting occurred on April 2, 2026, when a specified regulatory milestone was achieved, converting the PSUs into common stock. This transaction was conducted under pre-planned Rule 10b5-1(c) instructions, and after the sale, Viswanadhan directly holds 10,282 shares of Agios common stock.

feed.title: zSpace (ZSPC) CFO adds 136,000 RSUs and boosts common share holdings
feed.summary: zSpace, Inc. CFO Erick DeOliveira received a new grant of 136,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and exercised existing RSUs that converted into 21,083 shares of common stock. These transactions are equity-based compensation, aligning the CFO's interests with the company's performance, as no open-market buying or selling was involved. Following these activities, DeOliveira directly holds 61,583 common shares and 236,667 RSUs, with the new RSUs vesting quarterly over one year starting July 1, 2026, contingent on continued service.

feed.title: DoorDash (NYSE: DASH) director Tang sells $3.5M in stock under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: DoorDash director Stanley Tang reported selling a total of 23,125 shares of Class A Common Stock for $150.00 per share on April 2, 2026, transactions worth $3.47 million. These sales, which included both directly held shares and those from The ST Trust, were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After these transactions, Tang retains 19,279 direct Class A shares and significant exposure through convertible Class B shares.

feed.title: Former Deloitte COO Pete Shimer joins Cisco board in AI era
feed.summary: Cisco has appointed Pete Shimer, former Deloitte COO, CFO, and interim CEO, to its board of directors and Audit Committee, effective April 6, 2026. Shimer brings 40 years of leadership experience in enterprise transformation and digital strategy, aligning with Cisco's focus on AI era infrastructure. He also serves on the boards of Alaska Airlines, Korn Ferry, and Synopsys, and chairs the Cancer Artificial Intelligence Alliance (CAIA).

feed.title: Top Waste Management Stocks Worth Watching - April 6th
feed.summary: MarketBeat has identified seven waste management stocks worth watching, including Waste Management (WM), GFL Environmental (GFL), and Custom Truck One Source (CTOS), based on their recent dollar trading volume. The article highlights that the waste management sector offers stable, contract-driven revenue and dividend potential but is also subject to regulatory influences, commodity prices, and high infrastructure costs. Investors are advised that top-rated analysts suggest other buys, despite Waste Management having a Moderate Buy rating.

feed.title: Altimmune (ALT) director makes open-market share purchase
feed.summary: Altimmune, Inc. director John Gill purchased 9,200 shares of common stock on the open market at a weighted average price of $3.4076 per share, totaling approximately $31,350. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 21,700 shares. The purchase, made in multiple trades between $3.4050 and $3.4080, signals a positive sentiment from an insider.

feed.title: Verizon (NYSE: VZ) outlines Frontier deal and $55B shareholder returns
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. is preparing for its 2026 annual meeting where shareholders will vote on electing directors, executive compensation, and a new Long-Term Incentive Plan. The company highlighted strong operational momentum in Q4 2025, including over one million net additions and the completion of its Frontier acquisition, expanding fiber access to over 30 million homes and businesses. Verizon also announced a significant capital return program, aiming to return approximately $55 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases by the end of 2028, alongside recent leadership changes including the appointment of CEO Daniel Schulman and independent Chair Mark Bertolini.

feed.title: Utility serving 3.6 million customers sets May 1 earnings webcast
feed.summary: Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) has scheduled its first-quarter 2026 earnings call for May 1, 2026, at 11 a.m. ET. The company will host a live webcast and telephonic conference call to discuss financial results and other matters. Dominion Energy provides regulated electricity and natural gas services to millions of customers across Virginia, North Carolina, and South Carolina.

feed.title: Dominion Energy Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) announced it will host its first-quarter 2026 earnings call on Friday, May 1, 2026, at 11 a.m. ET. The company's management will discuss recent financial results and other topics of interest to stakeholders. A live webcast and telephonic access will be available for participants, with replays accessible afterward.

feed.title: Boeing Signs 40,000 Ton Soil-Based Carbon Removal Deal with Grassroots Carbon
feed.summary: Boeing has signed a multi-year agreement with Grassroots Carbon to purchase a minimum of 40,000 tons of durable carbon dioxide removal credits. These credits are generated through regenerative ranching and improved grassland management, primarily addressing Boeing's Scope 3 business travel emissions. This deal follows Boeing's "avoid first, remove second" carbon management strategy and a previous agreement with Carbonfuture.

feed.title: Principal Financial (NYSE: PFG) touts 18% TSR, $1.5B returns in proxy
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (NYSE: PFG) highlights strong 2025 financial performance in its proxy statement, including an 18% total shareholder return that outperformed the S&P 500 and over $1.5 billion returned to shareholders through repurchases and dividends. The company reported $781 billion in assets under management and $1.8 trillion in assets under administration, with margins expanding to 31%. Shareholders are asked to vote on director elections, executive pay, auditor ratification, and a new stock incentive plan at the upcoming virtual annual meeting on May 19, 2026.
